attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	  RANK () OVER (
ORDER	BY SMPTL.SEGMENT1,SMPTL.SEGMENT2,SMPTL.SEGMENT3,SMPTL.SEGMENT4,SMPTL.SEGMENT5,SMPTL.SEGMENT6,
				    SMPTL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,SMPTL.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,SMPTL.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,SMPTL.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
			) + MAX_VAL GENERAL_LaDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
	   SMPTL.SEGMENT1,
	   SMPTL.SEGMENT2,
	   SMPTL.SEGMENT3,
	   SMPTL.SEGMENT4,
	   SMPTL.SEGMENT5,
	   SMPTL.SEGMENT6, 
	   SMPTL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	  SMPTL.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
	   SMPTL.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
	   SMPTL.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT, 
	   user||'_Retro' as EDW_CREATE_USER    
FROM	
(
	SELECT	 SEGMENT1 ,
		  SEGMENT2,
		  SEGMENT3,
		  SEGMENT4,
		  SEGMENT5,
		  SEGMENT6, 
		  NSOBT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		  NCHACCT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
		  NCHACCT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,  
		  NCHACCT.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
	FROM
	(
		(SELECT	SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,CODE_COMBINATION_ID
		FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)	
	) STOMMF ,
		$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCHACCT ,   
	    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOBT,
		$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE
	 		NCHACCT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = STOMMF.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID
			AND	NSOBT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = STOMMF.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID
			And	  NSSC.Source_system_code = NSOBT.SS_CODE
			And	  NSSC.Global_name = STOMMF.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND	(STOMMF.SEGMENT1 IS NOT NULL
	AND	STOMMF.SEGMENT3 IS NOT NULL 
	AND	STOMMF.SEGMENT4 IS NOT NULL
	AND	STOMMF.SEGMENT5 IS NOT NULL
    AND	STOMMF.SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL
	AND	STOMMF.SEGMENT2 IS NOT NULL)
	AND NSOBT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME   >= current_timestamp(0)- interval '2' day
			AND	(STOMMF.SEGMENT1,STOMMF.SEGMENT3) IN 
			(
				SELECT	NFDTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE,NFDTV.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
				FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFDTV
				
			)
			AND	EXISTS (
								SELECT	1
								FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_LOCATION NFLTV
								WHERE	NFLTV.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE = STOMMF.SEGMENT2 
							 )
			AND	EXISTS (
								SELECT	1
								FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SUBACCOUNT NFSTV 
								WHERE	NFSTV.SK_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE = STOMMF.SEGMENT4 
									AND	NFSTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE = STOMMF.SEGMENT5
							  )
			AND	EXISTS (
								SELECT	1
								FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT NFPTV
								WHERE	NFPTV.BK_PROJECT_CODE = STOMMF.SEGMENT6
									
					   )	
			and not exists 
					(select 1 from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
					 where NSOBT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
					 and   STOMMF.CODE_COMBINATION_ID= NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT  
					 ) 
			and exists 
				(select 1 from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
				 where NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =NGLA.SS_CODE
				 and   STOMMF.CODE_COMBINATION_ID= NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT  
				 )
  ) SMPTL  ,
(
SELECT	COALESCE (MAX (GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
FROM	$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT) SGLM
WHERE	 Not EXISTS (
		SELECT	1
		FROM	$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT SGLM
		Where	
		SMPTL.SEGMENT1  =  SGLM.BK_COMPANY_CODE
			AND
		SMPTL.SEGMENT2  =  SGLM.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
			AND
		SMPTL.SEGMENT3  =  SGLM.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
			AND
		SMPTL.SEGMENT4  =  SGLM.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
			AND	
		SMPTL.SEGMENT5  =  SGLM.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
			AND
		SMPTL.SEGMENT6  =  SGLM.BK_PROJECT_CODE
			AND
		SMPTL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  =  SGLM.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
			AND
		 SMPTL.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT   =  SGLM.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
			AND
		SMPTL.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT  =  SGLM.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
		And	
		SMPTL.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT   = SGLM.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT )

SELECT	DISTINCT
 SGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
,NCHACCT.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_PROJECT_CODE
,NCHACCT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
,NCHACCT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_ENABLED_FLAG
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_END_DATE
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_START_DATE
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE
,SGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,MF_OM_GCC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.GLOBAL_NAME
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.CREATE_DATETIME
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,user||'_Retro' as EDW_CREATE_USER 
,user||'_Retro' as EDW_UPDATE_USER 
FROM
(
	(SELECT
	SMGCC.SEGMENT1 BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT2 BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT3 BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT4 BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT5 BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT6 BK_PROJECT_CODE,
	SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
	SMGCC.ENABLED_FLAG GL_ACCOUNT_ENABLED_FLAG,
	CAST(SMGCC.START_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_START_DATE,
	CAST(SMGCC.END_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_END_DATE,
	SMGCC.ACCOUNT_TYPE GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
	SMGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
	SMGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,
	SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME,
    SMGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
	FROM	
	$$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  SMGCC
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SMGCC.SEGMENT1,SMGCC.SEGMENT2,SMGCC.SEGMENT3,SMGCC.SEGMENT4,SMGCC.SEGMENT5,SMGCC.SEGMENT6,SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,SMGCC.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SMGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)	
) MF_OM_GCC
,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCHACCT
,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS SSOB
,$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT SGLA
WHERE
	   	  NCHACCT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = MF_OM_GCC.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT 
	AND	  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = MF_OM_GCC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND	  SSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT  = NCHACCT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT 
	AND	  SSOB.SS_CODE  = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE  = SGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE          = SGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE   = SGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE          = SGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_PROJECT_CODE             = SGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
	AND	  NCHACCT.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT      = SGLA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND	  NCHACCT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT    = SGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND	  NCHACCT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT       = SGLA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND	  SSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY                 = SGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND SSOB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME   >= current_timestamp(0)- interval '2' day
			and not exists 
					(select 1 from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
					 where SSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
					 and   MF_OM_GCC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT= NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT  
					 ) 
			and not exists 
					(select 1 from $$WORKDB.W_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
					 where SSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
					 and   MF_OM_GCC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT= NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT  
					 ) 
			and exists 
				(select 1 from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
				 where NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =NGLA.SS_CODE
				 and   MF_OM_GCC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT= NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT  
				 )

SELECT    RANK () OVER (
ORDER  BY SMPTL.SEGMENT1,SMPTL.SEGMENT2,SMPTL.SEGMENT3,SMPTL.SEGMENT4,SMPTL.SEGMENT5,SMPTL.SEGMENT6,
                                                                    SMPTL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,SMPTL.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,SMPTL.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,SMPTL.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
                                                ) + MAX_VAL GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
                   SMPTL.SEGMENT1,
                   SMPTL.SEGMENT2,
                  SMPTL.SEGMENT3,
                  SMPTL.SEGMENT4,
                   SMPTL.SEGMENT5,
                   SMPTL.SEGMENT6, 
                   SMPTL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
                   SMPTL.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
                   SMPTL.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT, 
                   SMPTL.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
FROM   
(
                SELECT  SEGMENT1 ,
                                  SEGMENT2,
                                  SEGMENT3,
                                  SEGMENT4,
                                  SEGMENT5,
                                  SEGMENT6, 
                                  NSOBT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
                                  NCHACCT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
                                  NCHACCT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,  
                                  NCHACCT.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
                FROM
                (
                                (SELECT                SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME
                                FROM   $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS
								QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)      
                                UNION ALL
                                (SELECT                SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME
                                FROM   $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS
								QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)                                                		
                                UNION ALL
                                (SELECT                SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME
                                FROM   $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS
                                QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)                           
                                UNION ALL
                                (SELECT                SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME
                                FROM   $$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_OM_GL_CD_COMBINATIONS
								QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)    
                              UNION ALL   
                                (SELECT                SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME
                                FROM   $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS
								QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2,SEGMENT3,SEGMENT4,SEGMENT5,SEGMENT6,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)                      
                ) STOMMF ,
                                
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCHACCT ,   
                 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOBT,
                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                                WHERE
                                                NCHACCT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = STOMMF.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID
                                                AND       NSOBT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = STOMMF.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID
                                                And          NSSC.Source_system_code = NSOBT.SS_CODE
                                                And          NSSC.Global_name = STOMMF.GLOBAL_NAME
                AND       (STOMMF.SEGMENT1 IS NOT NULL
                AND       STOMMF.SEGMENT3 IS NOT NULL 
                AND       STOMMF.SEGMENT4 IS NOT NULL
                AND       STOMMF.SEGMENT5 IS NOT NULL
                                                               AND       STOMMF.SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL
                AND       STOMMF.SEGMENT2 IS NOT NULL)
                                              AND       (STOMMF.SEGMENT1,STOMMF.SEGMENT3) IN 
                                                (
                                                                SELECT  NFDTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE,NFDTV.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
                                                                FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFDTV
                                                
)
                                                AND       EXISTS (
SELECT  1  
FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_LOCATION NFLTV
 WHERE NFLTV.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE = STOMMF.SEGMENT2 
)
AND       EXISTS ( 
SELECT  1 
FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SUBACCOUNT NFSTV 
WHERE NFSTV.SK_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE = STOMMF.SEGMENT4 
AND       NFSTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE = STOMMF.SEGMENT5
 )
 AND       EXISTS (  
SELECT  1 
FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT NFPTV 
WHERE NFPTV.BK_PROJECT_CODE = STOMMF.SEGMENT6
  )                                           
 ) SMPTL  ,
(

SELECT  COALESCE (MAX (GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
FROM   $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT) SGLM
WHERE Not EXISTS (
                      SELECT  1
 FROM   $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT SGLM
 Where  
SMPTL.SEGMENT1  =  SGLM.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 AND
SMPTL.SEGMENT2  =  SGLM.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
AND
 SMPTL.SEGMENT3  =  SGLM.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
 AND
SMPTL.SEGMENT4  =  SGLM.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
AND       
SMPTL.SEGMENT5  =  SGLM.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
AND
SMPTL.SEGMENT6  =  SGLM.BK_PROJECT_CODE
 AND
 SMPTL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  =  SGLM.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND
 SMPTL.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT   =  SGLM.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
AND
 SMPTL.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT  =  SGLM.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
And        
 SMPTL.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT   = SGLM.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
)

SELECT	DISTINCT
 SGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,SGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_ENABLED_FLAG
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_START_DATE
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_END_DATE
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
,NCHACCT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_PROJECT_CODE
,NCHACCT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
,NCHACCT.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.GLOBAL_NAME
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.CREATE_DATETIME
,MF_OM_GCC.ACTION_CODE
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
FROM
(
	(SELECT
	SMGCC.BATCH_ID,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT1 BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT2 BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT3 BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT4 BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT5 BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT6 BK_PROJECT_CODE,
	SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
	SMGCC.ENABLED_FLAG GL_ACCOUNT_ENABLED_FLAG,
	CAST(SMGCC.START_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_START_DATE,
	CAST(SMGCC.END_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_END_DATE,
	SMGCC.ACCOUNT_TYPE GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
	SMGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
	SMGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,
	SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME,
	SMGCC.ACTION_CODE,
	SMGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
	FROM	
	$$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SMGCC
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SMGCC.SEGMENT1,SMGCC.SEGMENT2,SMGCC.SEGMENT3,SMGCC.SEGMENT4,SMGCC.SEGMENT5,SMGCC.SEGMENT6,SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,SMGCC.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SMGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)	
	UNION	ALL
	(SELECT
	SOGCC.BATCH_ID,
	SOGCC.SEGMENT1 BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	SOGCC.SEGMENT2 BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
	SOGCC.SEGMENT3 BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
	SOGCC.SEGMENT4 BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
	SOGCC.SEGMENT5 BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
	SOGCC.SEGMENT6 BK_PROJECT_CODE,
	SOGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
	SOGCC.ENABLED_FLAG GL_ACCOUNT_ENABLED_FLAG,
	CAST(SOGCC.START_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_START_DATE,
	CAST(SOGCC.END_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_END_DATE,
	SOGCC.ACCOUNT_TYPE GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
	SOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
	SOGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,
	SOGCC.CREATE_DATETIME,
	SOGCC.ACTION_CODE,
	SOGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
	FROM	$$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SOGCC
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SOGCC.SEGMENT1,SOGCC.SEGMENT2,SOGCC.SEGMENT3,SOGCC.SEGMENT4,SOGCC.SEGMENT5,SOGCC.SEGMENT6,SOGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,SOGCC.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SOGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)
	UNION	ALL
	(SELECT	
	EMOGCC.BATCH_ID,
	EMOGCC.SEGMENT1 BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	EMOGCC.SEGMENT2 BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
	EMOGCC.SEGMENT3 BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
	EMOGCC.SEGMENT4 BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
	EMOGCC.SEGMENT5 BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
	EMOGCC.SEGMENT6 BK_PROJECT_CODE,
	EMOGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
	EMOGCC.ENABLED_FLAG GL_ACCOUNT_ENABLED_FLAG,
	CAST(EMOGCC.START_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_START_DATE,
	CAST(EMOGCC.END_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_END_DATE,
	EMOGCC.ACCOUNT_TYPE GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
	EMOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
	EMOGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,
	EMOGCC.CREATE_DATETIME,
	EMOGCC.ACTION_CODE,
	EMOGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
	FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_OM_GL_CD_COMBINATIONS EMOGCC
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EMOGCC.SEGMENT1,EMOGCC.SEGMENT2,EMOGCC.SEGMENT3,EMOGCC.SEGMENT4,EMOGCC.SEGMENT5,EMOGCC.SEGMENT6,EMOGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,EMOGCC.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY EMOGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)	
) MF_OM_GCC
,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCHACCT
,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS SSOB
,$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT SGLA
WHERE
	NCHACCT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = MF_OM_GCC.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT 
	AND	NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = MF_OM_GCC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND	  SSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT  = NCHACCT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT 
	AND	  SSOB.SS_CODE  = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND		MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE  = SGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
	AND	MF_OM_GCC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE          = SGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE   = SGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
	AND	MF_OM_GCC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE          = SGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_PROJECT_CODE             = SGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
	AND	NCHACCT.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT      = SGLA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND	NCHACCT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT    = SGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND	NCHACCT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT       = SGLA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND	  SSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY                 = SGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY

SELECT 
MF_OM_GCC.BATCH_ID,
MF_OM_GCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
MF_OM_GCC.GLOBAL_NAME,
MF_OM_GCC.ACCOUNT_TYPE,
MF_OM_GCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
MF_OM_GCC.ENABLED_FLAG,
MF_OM_GCC.PRESERVE_FLAG,
MF_OM_GCC.SEGMENT1,
MF_OM_GCC.SEGMENT2,
MF_OM_GCC.SEGMENT3,
MF_OM_GCC.SEGMENT4,
MF_OM_GCC.SEGMENT5,
MF_OM_GCC.SEGMENT6,
MF_OM_GCC.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
MF_OM_GCC.END_DATE_ACTIVE,
MF_OM_GCC.CREATE_DATETIME,
MF_OM_GCC.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
MF_OM_GCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
FROM
(
SELECT
SMGCC.BATCH_ID,
SMGCC.SEGMENT1,
SMGCC.SEGMENT2,
SMGCC.SEGMENT3,
SMGCC.SEGMENT4,
SMGCC.SEGMENT5,
SMGCC.SEGMENT6,
SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
SMGCC.ENABLED_FLAG,
SMGCC.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
SMGCC.END_DATE_ACTIVE,
SMGCC.ACCOUNT_TYPE,
SMGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
SMGCC.PRESERVE_FLAG,
SMGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,
SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME,
SMGCC.ACTION_CODE,
SMGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SMGCC 
UNION ALL
SELECT
SOGCC.BATCH_ID,
SOGCC.SEGMENT1,
SOGCC.SEGMENT2,
SOGCC.SEGMENT3,
SOGCC.SEGMENT4,
SOGCC.SEGMENT5,
SOGCC.SEGMENT6,
SOGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
SOGCC.ENABLED_FLAG,
SOGCC.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
SOGCC.END_DATE_ACTIVE,
SOGCC.ACCOUNT_TYPE,
SOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
SOGCC.PRESERVE_FLAG,
SOGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,
SOGCC.CREATE_DATETIME,
SOGCC.ACTION_CODE,
SOGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SOGCC
) MF_OM_GCC
WHERE (MF_OM_GCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,MF_OM_GCC.GLOBAL_NAME) NOT IN (
SELECT WGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME from $$WORKDB.W_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT WGLA, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=WGLA.SS_CODE)

SELECT	DISTINCT
 SGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,SGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_ENABLED_FLAG
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_START_DATE
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_END_DATE
,MF_OM_GCC.GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
,NCHACCT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_PROJECT_CODE
,NCHACCT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
,NCHACCT.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.GLOBAL_NAME
,MF_OM_GCC.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
,MF_OM_GCC.CREATE_DATETIME
,MF_OM_GCC.ACTION_CODE
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
FROM
(
	(SELECT
	
SCGCC.BATCH_ID,
SCGCC.SEGMENT1 BK_COMPANY_CODE,
SCGCC.SEGMENT2 BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
SCGCC.SEGMENT3 BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
SCGCC.SEGMENT4 BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
SCGCC.SEGMENT5 BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
SCGCC.SEGMENT6 BK_PROJECT_CODE,
SCGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
SCGCC.ENABLED_FLAG GL_ACCOUNT_ENABLED_FLAG,
CAST(SCGCC.START_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_START_DATE,
CAST(SCGCC.END_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_END_DATE,
SCGCC.ACCOUNT_TYPE GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
SCGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
SCGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCGCC.CREATE_DATETIME,
SCGCC.ACTION_CODE,
SCGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
	FROM	
	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SCGCC
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SCGCC.SEGMENT1,SCGCC.SEGMENT2,SCGCC.SEGMENT3,SCGCC.SEGMENT4,SCGCC.SEGMENT5,SCGCC.SEGMENT6,SCGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,SCGCC.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SCGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)	
	UNION	ALL
	(SELECT	
	
ECGCC.BATCH_ID,
ECGCC.SEGMENT1 BK_COMPANY_CODE,
ECGCC.SEGMENT2 BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
ECGCC.SEGMENT3 BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
ECGCC.SEGMENT4 BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
ECGCC.SEGMENT5 BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
ECGCC.SEGMENT6 BK_PROJECT_CODE,
ECGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
ECGCC.ENABLED_FLAG GL_ACCOUNT_ENABLED_FLAG,
CAST(ECGCC.START_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_START_DATE,
CAST(ECGCC.END_DATE_ACTIVE AS DATE) GL_ACCOUNT_END_DATE,
ECGCC.ACCOUNT_TYPE GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
ECGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
ECGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,
ECGCC.CREATE_DATETIME,
ECGCC.ACTION_CODE,
ECGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
	FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ECGCC
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ECGCC.SEGMENT1,ECGCC.SEGMENT2,ECGCC.SEGMENT3,ECGCC.SEGMENT4,ECGCC.SEGMENT5,ECGCC.SEGMENT6,ECGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,ECGCC.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY ECGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1)	
) MF_OM_GCC
,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCHACCT
,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS SSOB
,$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT SGLA
WHERE
	NCHACCT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = MF_OM_GCC.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT 
	AND	NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = MF_OM_GCC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND	  SSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT  = NCHACCT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT 
	AND	  SSOB.SS_CODE  = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND		MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE  = SGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
	AND	MF_OM_GCC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE          = SGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE   = SGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
	AND	MF_OM_GCC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE          = SGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
	AND	  MF_OM_GCC.BK_PROJECT_CODE             = SGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
	AND	NCHACCT.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT      = SGLA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND	NCHACCT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT    = SGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND	NCHACCT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT       = SGLA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND	  SSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY                 = SGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY

SELECT SCGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, SCGCC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SCGCC.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SCGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID, SCGCC.DETAIL_POSTING_ALLOWED_FLAG, SCGCC.DETAIL_BUDGETING_ALLOWED_FLAG, SCGCC.ACCOUNT_TYPE, SCGCC.ENABLED_FLAG, SCGCC.SUMMARY_FLAG, SCGCC.SEGMENT1, SCGCC.SEGMENT2, SCGCC.SEGMENT3, SCGCC.SEGMENT4, SCGCC.SEGMENT5, SCGCC.SEGMENT6, SCGCC.SEGMENT7, SCGCC.SEGMENT8, SCGCC.SEGMENT9, SCGCC.SEGMENT10, SCGCC.SEGMENT11, SCGCC.SEGMENT12, SCGCC.SEGMENT13, SCGCC.SEGMENT14, SCGCC.SEGMENT15, SCGCC.SEGMENT16, SCGCC.SEGMENT17, SCGCC.SEGMENT18, SCGCC.SEGMENT19, SCGCC.SEGMENT20, SCGCC.SEGMENT21, SCGCC.SEGMENT22, SCGCC.SEGMENT23, SCGCC.SEGMENT24, SCGCC.SEGMENT25, SCGCC.SEGMENT26, SCGCC.SEGMENT27, SCGCC.SEGMENT28, SCGCC.SEGMENT29, SCGCC.SEGMENT30, SCGCC.DESCRIPTION, SCGCC.TEMPLATE_ID, SCGCC.ALLOCATION_CREATE_FLAG, SCGCC.START_DATE_ACTIVE, SCGCC.END_DATE_ACTIVE, SCGCC.ATTRIBUTE1, SCGCC.ATTRIBUTE2, SCGCC.ATTRIBUTE3, SCGCC.ATTRIBUTE4, SCGCC.ATTRIBUTE5, SCGCC.ATTRIBUTE6, SCGCC.ATTRIBUTE7, SCGCC.ATTRIBUTE8, SCGCC.ATTRIBUTE9, SCGCC.ATTRIBUTE10, SCGCC.CONTEXT, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE1, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE2, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE3, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE4, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE5, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE6, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE7, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE8, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE9, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE10, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE11, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE12, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE13, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE14, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE15, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE16, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE17, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE18, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE19, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE20, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE21, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE22, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE23, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE24, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE25, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE26, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE27, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE28, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE29, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE30, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE31, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE32, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE33, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE34, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE35, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE36, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE37, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE38, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE39, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE40, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE41, SCGCC.SEGMENT_ATTRIBUTE42, SCGCC.REFERENCE1, SCGCC.REFERENCE2, SCGCC.REFERENCE3, SCGCC.REFERENCE4, SCGCC.REFERENCE5, SCGCC.JGZZ_RECON_FLAG, SCGCC.JGZZ_RECON_CONTEXT, SCGCC.PRESERVE_FLAG, SCGCC.REFRESH_FLAG, SCGCC.IGI_BALANCED_BUDGET_FLAG, SCGCC.COMPANY_COST_CENTER_ORG_ID, SCGCC.REVALUATION_ID, SCGCC.LEDGER_SEGMENT, SCGCC.LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, SCGCC.ALTERNATE_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, SCGCC.GES_UPDATE_DATE, SCGCC.GLOBAL_NAME, SCGCC.BATCH_ID, SCGCC.CREATE_DATETIME, SCGCC.ACTION_CODE ,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SCGCC WHERE (SCGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,SCGCC.GLOBAL_NAME) NOT IN (
SELECT WGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME from $$WORKDB.W_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT WGLA, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=WGLA.SS_CODE)
